description: Conflict recovery after a failed merge. Debugger investigates the conflict + applies targeted resolution + re-validates. Seconder + QA pipeline apply after the fix.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: failed merge / conflict / restitch needed. Source: {{conflict_source}}
SCOPE: the conflicted files identified by the failed merge.
NON_GOALS: no scope expansion beyond conflict resolution; no refactoring; no feature additions.
VALIDATION: targeted tests for the conflicted scope pass; integration smoke OK.
ACCEPTANCE: chain branch is mergeable cleanly to integration target.

Restitch chain: debugger investigates + resolves + re-validates.

steps.title: debugger:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: investigate conflict from {{conflict_source}}; identify whose change should win (upstream vs chain) per-hunk; apply minimal-diff resolution; re-run targeted validation.
INPUTS: root's conflict description; git status output; conflicted files.
OUTPUTS: resolved diff on chain branch; conflict-resolution rationale per hunk; passing targeted tests.
SCOPE: conflicted files only.
NON_GOALS: no scope creep; no refactoring; no `--no-verify`.

steps.title: seconder:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: fused scope/compliance + quality gate on debugger's diff.
INPUTS: debugger's diff; root contract.
OUTPUTS: verdict JSON with scope_verdict, scope_findings, quality_verdict, quality_findings, overall_verdict.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: test-engineer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: write tests against the actual diff.
INPUTS: debugger's diff; seconder verdict; root contract.
OUTPUTS: tests, fixtures, smoke scripts, telemetry assertions, exact test-runner commands.
SCOPE: test paths plus diff-adjacent harness code.
NON_GOALS: no production source edits unless root explicitly authorizes helper/export change.

steps.title: test-runner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: execute exact commands supplied by test-engineer and classify failures by owner.
INPUTS: exact commands; tests; telemetry assertions.
OUTPUTS: pass/fail counts, artifact evidence, owner routing, rerun guidance.
SCOPE: requested commands only; fallback must be labeled.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no scope expansion.

steps.title: obligations-scanner:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: scan debugger's diff for unstructured markers in production code.
INPUTS: debugger's diff.
OUTPUTS: CLEAN | OBLIGATIONS_FOUND | BLOCKED.
SCOPE: same as root.
NON_GOALS: no edits.

steps.title: reviewer:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: compliance reviewer; verify restitch resolves the conflict without regressing the chain's intent.
INPUTS: debugger diff + seconder verdict + obligations-scanner output + root's conflict context + chain's original intent.
OUTPUTS: verdict PASS|PARTIAL|FAIL + Release Checklist.
SCOPE: conflicted files + integration concerns.
NON_GOALS: no edits; do not extend scope to non-conflict items.
